title: FIME Personnel to Work from Cairo
content:
In the rapidly deteriorating situation in the Middle East and Lebanon, the staff of the Finnish Institute in the Middle East will relocate to Cairo to continue their work. We are closely monitoring the situation in the Middle East, particularly in Lebanon, and will inform in due course about any changes it may cause to the institute’s activities.

Artikkeli FIME Personnel to Work from Cairo julkaistiin ensimmäisen kerran Suomen Lähi-idän instituutti.
creator: Laura Aho
sourceTitle: Finnish Institute in the Middle East
